docTitle: Tira Iqedsen s tkarḍa · Tira Iqedsen s yiwen uzelmaḍ
metaDesc: Ḍfer amezruy n Lwaṣiya Taqdimt, tudert n Yasuɛ, akked isafaren n Bulus ɣef yiwet n takarḍa n tidet — Tira Iqedsen ḍrant deg yimukan n tidet.

s.kicker: Tira Iqedsen s yiwen uzelmaḍ · Tikarḍiwin
s.title: Tira Iqedsen s tkarḍa
s.verse: “Mačči d timucuha i wen-d-newwi mi i wen-d-neḥka ɣef tezmert n Ssid-nneɣ Yasuɛ Lmasiḥ d tisin-ines, meɛna s wallen-nneɣ i nwala tamanegt-is.” (2 Buṭrus 1:16)
s.purpose: Tira Iqedsen mačči d tamacahut n lekdeb. D akatay n yemdanen i yeddan ɣef yimukan, izmaz d yismawen n tidet. Ḍfer iberdan-nni ɣef takarḍa, s umizzwer n wakud — sit ɣef tneqqiḍt, neɣ sit ɣef ▶ akken ad tɛeddiḍ deg-s asurif deffir wayeḍ.
s.ot_h: Seg uxleq ɣer tuɣalin ɣer Urucalim
s.ot_lead: Mačči d yiwen n usafer kan, meɛna d abrid n umezruy n usellek seg uxleq: axleq d tuccḍa → anfal d Babil → tiɣṛi (Ibṛahim) → tamurt yettwaɛhden → Tuffɣa → anezruf → rrbeḥ → tagelda → abeṭṭu → tamegrareḍt → tuɣalin.
s.je_kick: ② Lwaṣiya Tamaynut — tudert n Yasuɛ
s.je_lead: Ḍfer tudert n Yasuɛ akken t-ḥekkun Ilqaḍ, s umizzwer — seg tlalit-is di Bitleḥem, ɣer uɣeṭṭas-is d tebṛaḥt n Jlili, ɣer Samarya, alamma d amidag, ḥeggu d tuli ɣer igenni di Urucalim.
s.pa_kick: ③ Lwaṣiya Tamaynut — isafaren n Bulus
s.pa_h: Seg Antyuxya ɣer ixfawen n ddunit — Ṛuma
s.pa_lead: Seg wass n Lɛunṣra di Urucalim, amek yemɣur Lexbeṛ n Lxir sennig Yahuda — di Asya Tamecṭuḥt d Uruppa alamma d ul n tgeldit. Fren yiwen seg semmus isafaren (amezwaru·wis sin·wis kraḍ + asafer ɣer Ṛuma + deffir tilelli), ḍfer ineḍruyen n Lecɣal n Imceggɛen akked tebṛatin i yuran deg webrid.
s.foot: Iɣbula · Imukan ttḍefṛen aḍris n Tira Iqedsen d tajuɣrafit yețwassnen n Tira Iqedsen (s yismawen n tura anda i d-yenfeɛ). Tamiwin n yilel, isaffen d yigelmimen țțwasuneɣen seg isefka n tajuɣrafit yeldin (Natural Earth), yețwasehlen.

eden.name: Ɛaden (Axleq · Tuccḍa)
eden.note: Ɣer ddunit yelhan nezzeh, ikcem-d ddnub yerna yegzem wassaɣ gar Yillu d talsa.
events: Axleq di setta wussan — « yelha nezzeh »
Amdan yettwaxleq s ṣṣifa n Yillu
Tuccḍa, d usuffeɣ seg Ɛaden
Lemɛahda tamezwarut n Lexbeṛ n Lxir — « ccetla n tmeṭṭut ad temḥeq aqerruy n yizerm »

noah.name: Ararat (Anfal)
noah.today: Adrar Ararat, asammer n Turkya ass-a
noah.note: Yeḥkem Yillu ɣef ddunit iččuṛen d ddnub, meɛna iḥrez tudert s yiwet n twacult.
events: Ddunit teččur d lfesad
Anfal, d lbabuṛ n Nuḥ
Lemɛahda n tislit n wanẓar — « ur d-yettuɣal ara wenfal ad isderm ddunit »

babel.name: Lbeṛj n Babil
babel.note: Mgal ujgugel i gessawaḍen alamma d igenni, Yillu isseɛweg tutlayin-nsen yerna imzerwɛen igduden ɣef lqaɛa.
events: « Kkret ad nebnu tamdint d lbeṛj … ad nefk isem i yiman-nneɣ »
Yillu isseɛweg tutlayt-nsen
Igduden mzerwɛen ɣef lqaɛa (Cinɛar — deffir akka Babil)

ur.name: Ur
ur.note: Tamacahut n usellek n Tira Iqedsen tebda-d s tiɣṛi n yiwen wergaz.
events: Yillu issawel i Abram akken ad iffeɣ seg Ur n Ikaldiyen
« Ad ak-rreɣ d lǧens ameqqran … iderman meṛṛa ad ttubarken yis-k »
S liman yeǧǧa tamurt-is

haran.name: Ḥaran
haran.note: Deg webrid, yerra-d awal n tiɣṛi ɣer tmurt yettwaɛhden.
events: Twacult n Taraḥ tezdeɣ di Ḥaran
Yemmut Taraḥ
Abram iṛuḥ ɣer Kenɛan di 75 iseggasen

shechem.name: Cakem · Kenɛan
shechem.note: Deg tmurt yettwaɛhden tettwabnu twacult yerna lemɛahda tɛeddi ɣer isuta.
events: Akcam ɣer Kenɛan, adekkan n iseflawen amezwaru — « ad fkeɣ tamurt-agi i tedfert-ik »
Lemɛahda (Amezruy n talsa 15) · Isḥaq · Yeɛqub
Tnac warraw n Yeɛqub — aẓar n tnac leɛṛac

egypt.name: Maṣer (Gucen)
egypt.note: Twacult tuɣal d lǧens ameqqran — syin d lǧens n waklan.
events: Yusef, yettnuzen, yuli ɣer leḥkem n Maṣer
Twacult n Yeɛqub meṛṛa tṣubb ɣer Maṣer si laẓ
Agdud n Isṛail yemɣin yuɣal d aklan

sinai.name: Adrar n Sina
sinai.note: Asellek igejdanen n Lwaṣiya Taqdimt — aklan uɣalen d agdud n Yillu.
events: Ɛecṛa lbeliyat akked izimer n Tfaska
Yilel Azeggaɣ yebḍa, agdud yezger
Ɛecṛa Lewṣayat, asaḍuf, aqiḍun n temlilit d yiseflawen

kadesh.name: Qadec (anezruf)
kadesh.note: Anmennuɣ n liman yesruḥ i yiwen n lǧil tamurt — meɛna Yillu yeqqim yid-sen.
events: Tnac yergazen i yin-uzznen ad ẓren tamurt — meɛna agdud yugi ad yamen
38 iseggasen deg unezruf — lmanna, asigna d tmes
Deg luḍa n Muab, aselmed aneggaru n Musa (Asmekti)

jericho.name: Yiriku
jericho.note: Di taggara kecmen yerna rebḥen tamurt yettwaɛhden.
events: Asif n Urdun yebḍa, agdud yezger
Leswaṛ n Yiriku ɣlin
Rrbeḥ n Kenɛan akked ubeṭṭu n tmurt

shiloh.name: Cilu (Inezzurfa)
shiloh.note: Mbla agellid, yal yiwen ixeddem ayen i s-yehwan — ilaq agellid n tidett.
events: Aqiḍun n temlilit yettwarsa di Cilu
Taneqqist n ddnub–lqehr–asellek (Debura, Gidɛun, Camcun)
Raɛut — laman deg wussan iberkanen, di ccetla n Dawed

jerusalem.name: Urucalim · Tagelda yedduklen
jerusalem.note: Lɛasr n wureɣ n Isṛail — d lemɛahda n ugellid n lebda.
events: Caɛul agellid amezwaru, syin Dawed akked Gulyat
Lemɛahda n Dawed — « akersi-k ad yili i lebda » (2 Ṣamwil 7)
Sliman ibennu lǧameɛ iqedsen di Urucalim

samaria.name: Samarya · Tagelda yebḍan
samaria.note: Tagelda tebḍa yerna teṣubb skud lanbiya ttɣuṛṛun.
events: Deffir Sliman, abeṭṭu ɣef Yahuda d Isṛail
Leṣnam yettɛawaden
Ilyas, Icaɛya, Irmiya ɣeṛṛen « uɣalet-d » — cehhden-d ɣef Lmasiḥ

nineveh.name: Ninwa (Aturya)
nineveh.note: Mi tɛeddan ɣef yal alɣu, agafa iɣli d amezwaru.
events: Ninwa, tamanaɣt n Aturya
Tagelda n ugafa teɣli ɣer Aturya (722 uqbel ƐM)
Yunes yettwaceggeɛ ɣer Ninwa

babylon.name: Babil
babylon.note: Iḍ aberkan akk — meɛna lemɛahda n tuɣalin teqqim.
events: Urucalim teɣli, lǧameɛ iqedsen iṛeɣ (586 uqbel ƐM)
Yahuda yettwawi ɣer Babil
Danyal d Ḥizqiyal — liman d timeẓriwin di tmegrareḍt

susa.name: Cucan (Faris)
susa.note: Ula deg wul n tgeldit taberkant, Yillu iḥrez agdud-is.
events: Faris teɣleb Babil
Astir tsellek Udayen seg usenger
Naḥamya yeẓẓal zdat ugellid, yettwaceggeɛ

return.name: Tuɣalin ɣer Urucalim
return.note: Uɣalen-d bnan — meɛna ur d-yusi ara ugellid. Ttṛaǧun Lmasiḥ.
events: Kraḍ lemwaji n tuɣalin s ulamer n Sirus (Zerubbabel 538 · Ɛezra 458 · Naḥamya 444)
Lǧameɛ iqedsen yettwabna, leswaṛ n Urucalim ttwasgemden
Malaxi — Lwaṣiya Taqdimt tfukk: « aql-i ad d-ceggɛeɣ amazan-inu »

bethlehem.name: Bitleḥem
bethlehem.note: Lmasiḥ yettwaɛhden yusa-d ɣer taddart n Dawed — Awal yuɣal d amdan.
events: Ilul-d di Bitleḥem, taddart n Dawed
Lmalayek beccṛen lexbaṛ i imeksawen
Imusnawen n yitran usan-d ad seǧden

nazareth.name: Naṣaret
nazareth.note: Yillu yemɣur d amdan deg taddart taḥeqqart.
events: Yemɣur deg wexxam n unejjar
Di tnac iseggasen, isteqsay yerna yerra-d di lǧameɛ iqedsen
Deffir akka yettwaggi di lǧameɛ n taddart-is

jordan.name: Asif n Urdun
jordan.note: Tebda tebṛaḥt-is tazayezt — igenni icehhed-it d Mmi-s.
events: Yețwaɣeṭṭes sɣur Yuḥenna
Ṛṛuḥ iṣubb-ed am tetbirt — « Wagi d Mmi ameɛzuz »
Iɣleb kraḍ tijeṛribin n Cciṭan deg unezruf

cana.name: Kana
events: Inebgi deg tmeɣra
Aman uɣalen d ccṛab — licaṛa-s tamezwarut
Inelmaden-is umnen yis

sychar.name: Sixar (Samarya)
sychar.note: Abrid n tebṛaḥt tamezwarut — seg Urucalim ɣer Samarya yețwakerhen.
events: Yessizdeg lǧameɛ iqedsen di Urucalim
Deg iḍ, Nikudem — « Ilaq ad d-tɛiwdeḍ talalit »
Aman yessidiren i tmeṭṭut n Samarya

capernaum.name: Kafernaḥum
capernaum.today: rrif n lbḥiṛa n Jlili ass-a
capernaum.note: Llsas n tebṛaḥt n Jlili — tiɣṛi, aselmed d ugellu mlalen dagi.
events: Issawel i iṣeggaden, yerra dagi d llsas-is
Aselmed ɣef wedrar — « D iseɛdiyen igellilen n Ṛṛuḥ »
Lemtel n tgelda — d ugellu i gemmun

galilee.name: Lbḥiṛa n Jlili
galilee.note: S tezmert-is ɣef ddunit ibeggen-d anwa-t.
events: « Ssers iman-ik ! Ssusem ! » — yessers aḍu
Iceɛceɛ 5000 s xemsa n teḥbulin n weɣrum d sin iselman
Ileḥḥu ɣef waman

caesarea_p.name: Qayṣarya n Filibus
caesarea_p.note: Inelmaden fehmen d akken d Lmasiḥ, yerna yeldi webrid n umidag.
events: Cehda n Buṭrus — « Kečč d Lmasiḥ, Mmi-s n Yillu yeddren »
Ixebbeṛ-d i tikkelt tamezwarut ɣef lmut-is d ḥeggu-s
Yebeddel udem-is s lɛaḍima ɣef wedrar

jericho.name: Yiriku
jericho.note: Deg webrid ɣer Urucalim, inadi ɣef wid iḍaɛen.
events: Yerra-d taẓri i Bartimay aderɣal
Issawel i Zake amekkas
« Mmi-s n wemdan yusa-d ad inadi ɣef wid iḍaɛen, ad ten-isellek »

bethany.name: Bitanya
bethany.note: Ibeggen-d tazmert-is ɣef lmut send ddurt-is taneggarut.
events: Yesseḥya-d Laɛzar seg uẓekka — « D nekk i d ḥeggu, d nekk i d tudert »
Meryem tedhen-it i temḍelt
Licaṛa-agi tqewwa ttḥila akken ad t-nɣen

jerusalem.name: Urucalim
jerusalem.note: Tuqqna anda tettwakemmel Tira Iqedsen meṛṛa — amidag, ḥeggu, tuli ɣer igenni.
events: Akcam s lɛaḍima; yeqleb daɣen ṭṭwabel n lǧameɛ iqedsen
Deg imensi aneggaru issired iḍaṛṛen n inelmaden
Yemmut ɣef umidag
Yeḥya-d deg wass wis kraḍ, syin yuli ɣer igenni

antioch.name: Antyuxya
antioch.note: Tajmaɛt i d-iceggɛen anda tebda yerna tețțuɣal tebṛaḥt ɣer ibeṛṛaniyen.
events: Deg tẓallit, Ṛṛuḥ yefrez Barnabas d Caɛul
Tajmaɛt anda i d-țțusemman imasiḥiyen i tikkelt tamezwarut i wid yumnen
Amkan n tuffɣa n usafer amezwaru, wis sin d wis kraḍ

seleucia.name: Silukya
seleucia.note: Lmeṛsa n Antyuxya — refden lbabuṛ ɣer Qubṛus.

salamis.name: Salamis (Qubṛus)
salamis.note: Aḥbas amezwaru di Qubṛus — beccṛen di leǧwameɛ.

paphos.name: Bafus
paphos.note: Tazmert tban-d mgal wid ibedden i Lexbeṛ n Lxir.
events: Ilimas aseḥḥar yețwargel
Sirjyus Bulus lḥakem yumen
Seg dagi « Bulus » yeṭṭef nnuba

perga.name: Perga
perga.note: Lmeṛsa di Bamfilya — dagi Yuḥenna Marqus yuɣal ɣer deffir.

pantioch.name: Antyuxya n Bisidya
pantioch.note: Lexbeṛ n Lxir yeldi ɣer ibeṛṛaniyen.
events: Aselmed ɣezzifen n umezruy n usellek di lǧameɛ
Aṭas ibeṛṛaniyen feṛḥen, qeblen awal
Ttwassufɣen s ugellu

iconium.name: Ikunya
iconium.note: Aṭas i yumnen, meɛna tuqehrit tessufeɣ-iten.

lystra.name: Listra
events: Isseḥla argaz iquḍṛen seg tlalit-is
Lɣaci ḥesben-ten d iṛebbiten, bɣan ad sen-fken iseflawen
Ṛeǧmen-t, ǧǧan-t am akken yemmut, meɛna yekker-d

derbe.name: Derba
derbe.note: Ssarwen aṭas n inelmaden; uɣalen ɣer deffir ad sseǧhden tijmuyaɛ.

troas.name: Truwas
troas.note: Anerni anda Lexbeṛ n Lxir yețțeddu i tikkelt tamezwarut ɣer Uruppa.
events: Aweḥḥi n yiwen wergaz n Masidunya
« Ɛeddi-d ɣur-neɣ, ɛiwen-aɣ »
Zegren imiren ɣer Uruppa

philippi.name: Filibus
philippi.note: Tajmaɛt tamezwarut n Uruppa — Lexbeṛ n Lxir yerbeḥ ula di lḥebs.
events: Lidya, tin yeznuzun leḥrir azeggaɣ, tumen
Taklit yețțuqehhren s lǧen tețwasellek
Ccnawi n tlemmast n yiḍ, zzelzla, twacult n uɛessas tețwasellek

thess.name: Tisalunik
events: Immeslay di lǧameɛ tlata n wussan n westeɛfu
« D irgazen-agi i yerwin ddunit »
Ffɣen s tuffra deg iḍ

berea.name: Biriya
berea.note: Wid « ilhan » i inecden awal s yiman-nsen.
events: Qeblen awal s lferḥ ameqqran
Kra n wass nadin Tira akken ad ẓren ma tṣeḥḥa
Aṭas i yumnen

athens.name: Atinas
athens.note: Di temdint n ifilusufen ibecceṛ « Yillu ur nețwassen ara ».
events: Iɣaḍ-it wul mi iwala tamdint teččur d leṣnam
Ɣef Areyufaj ibecceṛ Axellaq d ḥeggu
Ḍsan fell-as, meɛna kra i yumnen

corinth.name: Kurintus
corinth.note: Yeqqim aseggas d wezgen, izerreɛ tajmaɛt di temdint n cceṛ.
events: Ixeddem iqiḍan akked Akilas d Brisila
« Ur ttaggad ara … axaṭer aql-i yid-k »
Aṭas n at Kurintus umnen, țwaɣeṭṭsen

ephesus.name: Ifasus
ephesus.note: Ul n usafer wis kraḍ — awal yemɣur di Asya.
events: Aselmed n yal ass sin iseggasen deg tzeqqa n Tiranus
Idlisen n sseḥḥur ṛeɣen; lecɣal n tezmert
Dimitriyus axeddam n lfeṭṭa yekker-d ccwal

miletus.name: Militus
miletus.note: Sslam aneggaru s imeṭṭawen i imɣaren n Ifasus.
events: « Ɛasset ɣef tejmaɛt i d-yuɣ Yillu s idammen-is »
Imɣaren ttrun, ẓran ur t-țwalin ara daɣen

caesarea.name: Qayṣarya
caesarea.note: Sin iseggasen iḥarab ɣef Lexbeṛ n Lxir zdat lḥekkam d ugellid.
events: Ccṛeɛ zdat lḥekkam Filiks d Fistus
Aḥareb-is zdat ugellid Agribas
« Ad rẓeɣ ccṛeɛ ɣer Qayṣar » — ɣer Ṛuma

jerusalem.name: Urucalim
jerusalem.note: Yețwaṭṭef di lǧameɛ iqedsen, yebda webrid-is d ameḥbus.
events: Yețwaṭṭef sɣur lɣaci di lǧameɛ iqedsen
Iḥarab ɣef yiman-is zdat useqqamu
Imi d aṛumani, yețwaceggeɛ s tɛessast ɣer Qayṣarya

myra.name: Mira
myra.note: Uɣalen ɣer lbabuṛ n Skandarya iteddun ɣer Ṛuma.

fairhaven.name: Lmeṛsa Yelhan (Kritus)
fairhaven.note: Alɣu n Bulus akken ad ḥebsen abrid ur d-yețwaṭṭef ara.

crete.name: Kritus
crete.note: Deffir tilelli-s, tigzirt anda yeǧǧa Tiṭus akken ad iseɣwer tijmuyaɛ.
events: Yeǧǧa Tiṭus ad isbedd imɣaren di yal taddart
Yessuter imɣaren ur nesɛi lɛib, d wid iṣeḥḥan di liman
Yura tabṛat ɣer Tiṭus

malta.name: Malṭa
malta.note: Gar tbuciḍant d uɣelluy n lbabuṛ, lemɛahda n Yillu teṭṭef.
events: Aḍu aqewwan yesderm lbabuṛ, meɛna 276 yemdanen akk menɛen
Yekkat-it wezrem, meɛna ur t-yuɣ wara
Isseḥla imuḍan n tegzirt

rome.name: Ṛuma
rome.book: Lecɣal n Imceggɛen 28 · Tibṛatin n lḥebs · 2 Timuti
rome.note: Lexbeṛ n Lxir yewweḍ ɣer wul n tgeldit tameqqrant — mačči d taggara meɛna d tazwara.
events: Sin iseggasen d ameḥbus deg wexxam, ibecceṛ tagelda n Yillu mbla tugdi
Seg dagi yura Tibṛatin n lḥebs (At Ifasus·At Filibus·At Kulus·Filimun)
Deffir akka yețwaḥbes daɣen, yura 2 Timuti yerna yețwanɣa ɣef ddemma n liman-is — « nnuɣeɣ imenɣi n tidett, kemmleɣ abrid-iw »
